title: Legal Fees and Billing - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## Legal Fees and Billing
Most procedures are undertaken on a flat-fee basis . The USCIS and other applicable fees are clearly indicated so that our clients understand the totality of the costs associated with the work that has been requested. For some very unusual cases we do charge fees on an hourly basis after discussion with the client.
Generally, payment is due upfront to initiate the case. An invoice will be sent with the amount due, once we have obtained the completed Legal Representation Agreement (LRA). The legal department will begin work when we receive payment for the invoice sent.
For our superb reputation and outstanding service, the Murthy Law Firm’s fees are considered quite reasonable, and are much less than those of some of the larger, big-city law firms.
For the convenience of our clients, we have the facility to accept American Express, Discover, MasterCard, and VISA payments.

### For Companies Seeking Advice on Processes for Multiple Employees
If you are an employer or a company rep, call 410.356.5440, extension 270. Our Corporate Services Representative will help you examine your options and determine if you are eligible for a FREE Corporate Pre-Hire consultation with one of our attorneys. During your consultation, you may discuss special, corporate rates and the processes reserved for companies with multiple-employee processing needs. If the matter you present requires any legal advice, we will suggest that you schedule a standard consultation.
NOTE: Do not use the form below for corporate rates.

### Get a Fee Quote by eMail
We will use your eMail address only to send you the information you request. Your contact information will not be shared or given to others.  Refer to our privacy policy for more detail.
